title: Be the Top Dog on Hyperliquid $HYPE
summary_title: TopDog's multiplayer trading footprints: Copy smarter traders without blindly following them
summary_description: Telegram mini-app showing real-time whale positions on Hyperliquid perps, designed for casual degen traders who want signals, not analytics.

key_moments.label: Why TopDog was built: Copy-trading consistently sank their balance
Solution: Real-time footprints on chart, not blind copying
Multiplayer first design distinguishes TopDog from other terminals
No wallet connection needed—Telegram single-click onboarding
Guild wars and respect points launching next week
Trench mode for HyperEVM meme coins coming within a month

pull_quote: Blindly copy-trading just doesn't work. We figured out you need the signal of successful wallets but still proactively make your own decisions, not sink your balance.
